urdu transliteration text:
Na Deen Kuch Hai Na Duniya     Hai Fatima Kay BaghairReligion is nothing, nor is the world…    without Fatima
Jahan-e-Kun Mei Andhera     Hai Fatima Kay BaghairThe universe is dark…     without Fatima

Bata Raha Hai Zamanay Ko Sura-e-Kauthar
Kalaam-e-Paak Adhoora     Hai Fatima Kay BaghairThe holy book (Quran)    is not complete…    without Fatima
english translation text: Sura Kauthar (a passage of the Quran) is showing the world

urdu transliteration text:
Jo Betion Kay Mukhalif Hain Eysay Logon Nay
Khuda Kay Deen Ko Samjha Hai Fatima Kay Baghair
understood God's religion… without Fatima
english translation text: Those who do not think favorably of daughters, such people have

urdu transliteration text:
Her Ek Namaz Mei Tasbih-e-Fatima Parheeyai
In every prayer, recite the Tasbih (Rosary) of Fatima
Namaz Varna Khasara  Hai Fatima Kay Baghair
Otherwise your prayer is deficient… without Fatima

Qasam Ali Ki Hai Mabood Band Kerday Issay
Agar Ye Qalb Dharakta
Hai Fatima Kay Baghair
without Fatima
english translation text:
I swear by Ali, my Lord stop this heart
If this heart beats…

urdu transliteration text:
Chalo Savaal Karain Chal Kay Hur Ki Khidmat Mei
Qubool Kya Koi Tauba
Hai Fatima Kay Baghair
Is any repentance
accepted…
without Fatima?
english translation text: Let's go ask a question in Hur's presence:

urdu transliteration text:
Ye Ek Maqsad-e-Mi'raaj Ho Bhi Sakta Hai
Nabi Ka Dil Nahin Lagta
Hai Fatima Kay Baghair
The Prophet's heart
without Fatima
english translation text:
This could also be one of the purposes for Mi'raaj (The Prophet’s Ascension to the Heavens)
is not at peace…

urdu transliteration text:
Furu-e-Deen Say Qurbat Usool-e-Deen Say Door
Practicing the Furoo-e-Deen  (Secondary Commandments)
while not embracing the Usool-e-Deen (Primary Commandments)
Kay Jaisay Ulfat-e-Fizza
english translation text:
Hai Fatima Kay Baghair
That's like the love of Fizza…
without Fatima

urdu transliteration text:
Zahoor-e-Saani-e-Zehra Ka Ye Sabab To Nahien
Husayn Reh Nahin Sakta
Hai Fatima Kay Baghair
Husayn (Fatima’s Son)
can not live… without Fatima
english translation text: Could the reason for the existence of Zaynab (Fatima’s Daughter) not be this?
